steps.title: Identify what the goal requires
steps.content: The goal is to “indicate the location” of the Isthmus of Mansheya. This means the sentence must explicitly establish where this geographical feature is situated.

steps.title: Match the requirement to the choices
steps.content: Choice C directly indicates location by stating “located in Egypt” and specifying the geographic relationship: it “connects the island of Pharos to mainland Alexandria.” The other three fail the goal—A treats it only as an example, D describes its function but not its location, and B provides a general definition without mentioning this isthmus. That matches choice C — C is correct.
